description: Named relevance dataset for Knowledge Vault user-vault semantic search evaluation.

documents.title: Q1 Revenue Report
documents.content: Our Q1 revenue reached $2.4 million, exceeding the target by 12%. The main growth drivers were enterprise subscriptions (up 34%) and expansion revenue from existing customers (up 18%). Churn remained low at 2.1% monthly. The sales team closed 47 new enterprise deals.

documents.title: Marketing Strategy 2026
documents.content: The 2026 marketing strategy focuses on three pillars: content-led growth, product-led acquisition, and partner ecosystem development. Content channels include SEO blog, LinkedIn thought leadership, and monthly webinars. Target CAC is $800 for SMB and $4,500 for enterprise. The primary ICP is operations-heavy companies with 50-500 employees.

documents.title: Product Roadmap H1 2026
documents.content: H1 2026 product priorities: (1) AI workflow builder with natural language triggers, (2) advanced analytics dashboard with custom KPI builder, (3) API integrations with Salesforce and HubSpot. The workflow builder ships in March, analytics in April, and CRM integrations in June. Engineering team velocity is 42 story points per sprint.

documents.title: Customer Support Playbook
documents.content: Support SLA: P1 bugs resolved within 4 hours, P2 within 24 hours, P3 within 72 hours. Customer escalation path: support rep > senior support > customer success manager > VP of Customer Success. CSAT target is 4.5 out of 5. Common issues: OAuth token expiry, webhook delivery failures, and CSV import limits.

documents.title: Hiring Plan Q2 2026
documents.content: Q2 2026 open roles: 2 senior backend engineers (Python/FastAPI), 1 ML engineer for embedding and retrieval work, 1 product designer, and 1 sales development representative. Total headcount target is 38 by end of Q2. Hiring budget is $180k in recruiting fees. All engineering interviews include a take-home system design exercise.

queries.query: What was our Q1 revenue performance?
